note: Manual re-evaluation of 45 batch-2 test cases using Lambda logic, S3 data files, and the evaluate-wait-time skill. Replaces Haiku LLM judge scores.
evaluator: Claude Opus (manual trace against data files)

results.explanation: Datura stramonium, G3, post, high, cebada. Rank 1 = Laudis WG + Oizysa. Cebada interval=5mo. Laudis WG wait=4, Oizysa=1. Both pass. Agent matched rank 1.
Digitaria sanguinalis, G3, post, high, avena. Rank 1 = Laudis WG solo (score 5). Avena interval=5mo. Laudis WG wait=1. Passes. Agent matched rank 1.
Polygonum aviculare, G1, post, high, triticale. Rank 1 = Laudis WG + Monsoon. Triticale interval=5mo. Both waits=1. Pass. Monsoon warning included.
Xanthium strumarium, G3, post, high, garbanzo. Rank 1 = Laudis WG + Oizysa. Garbanzo interval=8mo (Feb next year). Both waits=1. Pass.

Portulaca oleracea, G3, post, high, veza. Veza interval=5mo. Ranks 1-4 fail (Monsoon=11, Capreno=11, Fluva=24). First valid = Rank 5: Laudis WG + Oizysa (score 4). Agent correctly returned this. No exclusion text needed since top_score=4 > 3.
Chenopodium album, G3, post, high, habas. Habas interval=5mo. Rank 1 Laudis WG+Fluva fails (Fluva=24). Rank 2 Laudis WG+Oizysa passes (both=1). Agent matched.

Cirsium arvense, G3, post, high, brocoli. Brocoli interval=4mo. Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon fails (Monsoon=6>4). Rank 2 Laudis WG+Fluva passes (both=1) with restriction text. Agent matched with correct restriction.
Stellaria media, G2, pre, low dose. Rank 1 = Adengo (0.33 L/HA) score 5. Cebada interval=5mo. Adengo wait for cebada G2=4. Passes. Adengo warning included.

Galinsoga parviflora, G3, pre, high (not sandy), patata. Patata interval=9mo (Mar next year). All 4 ranks fail: Rank 1 Adengo(12>9), Rank 2 Adengo+Dimetenamida(12>9), Rank 3 Spade Flexx(11>9), Rank 4 Spade Flexx+Dimetenamida(11>9). Agent correctly returned 'no applicable treatments' with exclusion list of 3 treatments (score>3). HAIKU SCORED THIS 1 BUT THE AGENT WAS CORRECT.

Panicum dichotomiflorum, G3, post, high, col. Col interval=4mo. Ranks 1-4 all contain Monsoon (wait=24>4), all fail. Rank 5 = Laudis WG + Cubix (LaudisWG=1, Cubix=1, both pass). Agent correctly returned Rank 5. HAIKU SCORED 2 BUT AGENT WAS CORRECT.
Papaver rhoeas, G3, post, high, cebolla. Cebolla interval=9mo (Mar next year). Rank 1 = Monsoon+Fluva. Monsoon wait=5<=9, Fluva=1<=9. Passes with restriction text. Monsoon warning included.

Abutilon theophrasti, G3, post, high, tomate. Tomate interval=9mo (Mar next year). Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon fails (Monsoon=24>9). Rank 2 Monsoon+Fluva fails. Rank 3 Laudis WG+Fluva fails (Fluva=10>9). Rank 4 Monsoon+Oizysa fails. Rank 5 Laudis WG+Cubix passes (LaudisWG=6<=9, Cubix=1). Agent correctly returned Rank 5. HAIKU SCORED 3 BUT AGENT WAS CORRECT.

Abutilon theophrasti, G1, post, high, algodon. Agent said 'algodon not in database'. But Algodon IS in crop_names.csv (line 24) and in wait time table for all 3 groups. Agent/Lambda failed crop name resolution, likely due to encoding mismatch in crop_name_variations.csv where standard_name has accented character. This is a genuine bug.
Echinochloa crus-galli, G3, post, high, tabaco. Tabaco interval=10mo (Apr next year). Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon fails (Monsoon=24>10). Rank 2 Laudis WG+Cubix passes (both=1). Agent matched Rank 2.
Solanum nigrum, G3, post, high, alubia. Alubia interval=11mo (May next year). Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon. Monsoon wait=11<=11. Passes exactly. Agent matched Rank 1 with Monsoon warning.
Datura stramonium, G3, post, high, judia verde. Judia verde interval=11mo (May next year). Rank 1 Laudis WG+Oizysa (both=1<=11). Passes. Agent matched Rank 1.
Digitaria sanguinalis, G3, post, high, trigo. Adengo_applied=true blocks Adengo/Spade Flexx/Monsoon. Rank 1 = Laudis WG solo (not blocked). Trigo interval=5, LaudisWG wait=5. Passes. Agent matched.
Chenopodium album, G3, post, high, trigo. Taboo=Capreno. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Fluva (no Capreno, not blocked). Trigo interval=5, LaudisWG=5, Fluva=1. Both pass. Agent matched.

Solanum nigrum, G3, post, high, trigo. Blocked: LaudisWG(taboo), Adengo/SpadeFlexx/Monsoon(adengo_applied). Ranks 1-6 all blocked. Rank 7 = Capreno+Fluva (not blocked). Trigo interval=5, Capreno=1, Fluva=1. Both pass. Agent matched.
Spanish 'verdolaga' correctly resolved to Portulaca oleracea. Rank 1 = Monsoon+Oizysa. Trigo interval=5. Both pass. Monsoon warning included.
Spanish 'amapola' correctly resolved to Papaver rhoeas. Rank 1 = Monsoon+Fluva. Trigo interval=5. Both pass. Monsoon warning included.
Spanish 'estramonio' correctly resolved to Datura stramonium. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Oizysa. Trigo interval=5. Both pass.
Crop 'canola' correctly resolved to colza. Colza interval=3mo. Ranks 1-7 all fail (LaudisWG=4>3, Monsoon=12>3, Capreno=12>3). Rank 8 = Fluva+Oizysa (both=1<=3). Agent matched.
Crop 'soya' correctly resolved to soja. Soja interval=9mo. Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon fails (Monsoon=11>9). Rank 3 Laudis WG+Cubix passes (both=1). Agent matched.

Crop 'arveja' correctly resolved to guisante. Guisante interval=8mo (Feb next year). Rank 1 fails (LaudisWG=9>8). Rank 3 Monsoon+Oizysa passes (Monsoon=1, Oizysa=1) with restriction 'siguiente cultivo ha de ser de primavera'. Agent matched with correct restriction.
Genus 'Chenopodium' resolved to Chenopodium album via embedding. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Fluva. Trigo interval=5. LaudisWG=5, Fluva=1. Both pass. Agent matched.

Genus 'Polygonum' — all 4 Polygonum species have empty genus column in CSV. Embedding for bare 'Polygonum' likely below 0.6 threshold. Agent asks which species (convolvulus, persicaria, aviculare). This is valid behavior per the Lambda's suggestion mechanism. Minor: lapathifolium not listed but may not have been in top-3 embedding matches.

Equisetum arvense, G3, post, high, trigo. Rank 1 = Monsoon+Fluva, lower_score=1. Trigo interval=5. Monsoon=1, Fluva=1. Pass. Agent correctly included 'very limited efficacy' warning (score=1<3) and follow-up suggestion.

Cynodon dactylon, G3, post, high, trigo. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Fluva, lower_score=5. Trigo interval=5. LaudisWG=5, Fluva=1. Pass. No efficacy warning needed since score=5>3. HAIKU SCORED 3 EXPECTING EFFICACY WARNING BUT SCORE=5 MEANS NO WARNING NEEDED.
Two-weed Chenopodium album + Datura stramonium, G3, post, high, trigo. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Oizysa. Trigo interval=5. Both=1. Pass. Agent matched.
Two-weed Digitaria + Xanthium, G3, post, high, trigo. Agent returned Monsoon+Fluva. Trigo interval=5. Monsoon=1, Fluva=1. Both pass. Monsoon warning included.
Two-weed Polygonum + Sinapis, G3, post, high, trigo. Agent returned Laudis WG+Monsoon. Trigo interval=5. LaudisWG=5, Monsoon=1. Both pass. Monsoon warning included.
Sinapis arvensis, G1, post, high, trigo. Asturias=Group 1. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Monsoon. Trigo interval=5. G1: LaudisWG=5, Monsoon=1. Both pass. Monsoon warning included.
Portulaca oleracea, G3, post, high, trigo. Murcia=Group 3. Rank 1 = Monsoon+Oizysa. Trigo interval=5. Monsoon=1, Oizysa=1. Both pass. Monsoon warning included.

Polygonum aviculare, G2, pre, low dose, trigo. Burgos=Group 2. G2+pre=low dose. Rank 1 = Adengo (0.33 L/HA). Trigo interval=5. Adengo wait for trigo G2=4<=5. Passes. Adengo warning included. No stage question asked for pre-emergence.

Abutilon theophrasti, G3, post, high, patata. Patata interval=9mo. Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon fails (Monsoon=12>9). Ranks 2-4 also fail (Monsoon/Fluva 12-24mo). Rank 5 Laudis WG+Cubix passes (both=1). Agent matched Rank 5.

Digitaria sanguinalis, G3, post, high, colza. Colza interval=3mo. Ranks 1-6 all fail (LaudisWG=4>3, Monsoon=12, Capreno=12). Rank 7 Fluva+Oizysa passes (both=1) with score=3, triggering 'limited efficacy' warning. Exclusion list shows failed treatments with score>3. Agent matched perfectly.

Sinapis arvensis, G1, post, high, brocoli. Brocoli interval=4mo. Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon fails (Monsoon=6>4). Rank 3 Laudis WG+Fluva passes (LaudisWG=1, Fluva=1) with restriction text about deep plowing. Agent matched correctly. HAIKU SCORED 2 INCORRECTLY.

Galinsoga parviflora, G1, post, high, col. Col interval=4mo. Rank 1 Laudis WG+Monsoon fails (Monsoon=24>4). Rank 3 Laudis WG+Fluva passes (both=1) with restriction text. Agent matched correctly. HAIKU SCORED 2 INCORRECTLY.

Amaranthus palmeri, G3, LOW, colza. Hardcoded path: Spade Flexx+Dimetenamida 72%+Diflufenican 50%. Colza interval=3mo. Spade Flexx=4>3 FAIL, Diflufenican=7>3 FAIL. Agent correctly returned treatment AND 'cannot plant colza' warning.

Cyperus rotundus, G1, HIGH, colza. Agent asked 'pre or post emergence?' But Cyperus G1 HIGH triggers hardcoded consecutive pre+post path (override_timing=true). Agent should NOT ask timing — the orchestration prompt should recognize this and pass directly to Lambda. Agent bug.

Setaria viridis, G1, HIGH, colza. Agent asked 'pre or post emergence?' But Setaria G1 HIGH triggers hardcoded consecutive pre+post path (override_timing=true). Agent should NOT ask timing. Same orchestration bug as TC-106.
Misspelled 'Dattura stramonuim' correctly resolved to Datura stramonium via embedding. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Oizysa for Datura/trigo. Passes.
Misspelled 'Echinocloa crus gali' correctly resolved to Echinochloa crus-galli. Rank 1 = Laudis WG+Monsoon for Echinochloa/trigo. Passes. Monsoon warning included.
English 'garlic' resolved to ajo. Ajo interval=4mo. Ranks 1-10 all fail (LaudisWG=5>4, Monsoon=24, Capreno=6). Rank 11 Fluva+Oizysa passes (both=1) with restriction text. Agent matched correctly.
